questions.question: Implement the Bubble Sort algorithm for the following list of integers: [64, 34, 25, 12, 22, 11, 90]. Determine the number of swaps made in the process.
questions.hint: Note: You can use a programming language of your choice for implementation.

questions.question: Given an array of integers, explain the time complexity of the Selection Sort algorithm and provide a brief example of how it works.
questions.hint: You can use diagrams or pseudocode to illustrate your explanation.

questions.question: Describe the difference between Insertion Sort and Selection Sort. Provide a simple example to illustrate the distinction.
questions.hint: Focus on the key steps involved in each algorithm.
